name: arch_inv_zero_layers
reason: An empty architecture with no layers satisfies inv(), yet it cannot describe any valid address translation

name: arch_inv_nonstandard_entry_size
reason: A single-layer arch with non-power-of-2 entry_size (7) and arbitrary num_entries (3) satisfies inv() since entry_size_is_next_layer_size is vacuously true for the last layer

name: well_formed_unaligned_base
reason: A directory with base_vaddr=1 (misaligned to any realistic entry_size) satisfies well_formed because the alignment check is commented out

name: dir_inv_all_invalid
reason: A directory with every entry Invalid satisfies inv() vacuously, meaning an entirely empty page table at any layer is considered valid

name: pages_match_vacuous_no_pages
reason: pages_match_entry_size is vacuously true when no entry is a Page, so a directory of only Directory/Invalid entries trivially satisfies it without any frame size guarantee
